overview.description: The Leuthold Core ETF (LCR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively-managed global asset allocation fund of funds which seeks total return. LCR was launched on Jan 6, 2020 and is issued by Leuthold.
